text: Code reviews are an essential practice in software development. During a code review, another developer examines your code before it is merged into the project. This helps catch bugs early, when they are much easier and cheaper to fix. Beyond finding errors, code reviews are a valuable tool for knowledge sharing. Team members learn from each other's techniques, coding styles, and solutions to problems. This process naturally improves the overall quality of the team's work, as everyone contributes to maintaining high standards. Ultimately, code reviews build stronger, more effective teams.
